nasb.text: The soldiers’ plan was to kill the prisoners, so that none of them would swim away and escape;

esv.text: The soldiers’ plan was to kill the prisoners, lest any should swim away and escape.

cnv.text: 士兵想把囚犯都殺掉，免得有人游泳逃脫。

ccb.text: 士兵们想把囚犯全杀掉，怕有人乘机游泳逃走。

csbs.text: 士兵们的计划是要把囚犯杀了，免得有人游泳逃脱。
